name: Caladan
bio: Bare-chested, chained, and more beast than monarch, Caladan embodied the raw fury of the forsaken. His fists and chains were weapons of mass destruction, and he fought like a living meteor. Despite his savagery, he bore the tragic air of a king who had lost everything, left with only rage
A trial participant who battles Reign and Kandor as 'kingslayers'; ultimately defeated and floored.
